case_title: GABRIEL, KEITH VS GRISCOM, WILLIAM (STAR CELLULAR) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,368.04 FILED BY GABRIEL, KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT GRISCOM, WILLIAM (STAR CELLULAR) ROYSE, GREG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
HOLD JUDGMENT UNTIL 4/1/97. FOLDER IN FANNY'S DESK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GABRIEL, KEITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRISCOM, WILLIAM (STAR CELLULAR) ROYSE, GREG $783.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $810.00, PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO DEFTS PAYING PLFT $783. ON OR BEFORE 4/5/97. IF THIS OCCURS PLAINTIFF WILL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GRISCOM, WILLIAM (STAR CELLULAR)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROYSE, GREG
CERT MAIL TO GREG ROYSE AT START CELLULAR RETURNED SIGNED.
POS ON SUBPENA DUCES TECUM FILED IN COURT.
DISM CASE IMMEDIATELY WITH PREJUDICE & PROVIDE DEF WITH A COPY OF DISMISSAL. IF DEFTS FAIL TO PAY THE ABOVE AMT PLFT WILL HAVE JUDGMT IN THE AMT OF $783
